Aidan Rickert

PCBs & Analog Integrated Circuits

Home About

Hi! Find selected projects here, and learn more about me on the About page. This website is also very new and actively being worked on, let me know if you have suggestions!

Skills

Analog & Mixed-Signal

  • IC Design
  • Power Electronics
  • Noise Analysis
  • Sensor Front-Ends

PCBs & ECAD

  • Altium
  • Cadence Virtuoso / Spectre
  • KiCad
  • Multi-layer Layout
  • Signal Integrity

Software & Embedded

  • Python
  • C/C++
  • Verilog
  • ESP32 / PlatformIO
  • SPI / RS-485 / I2C

Projects

Diablo DAQ

Data acquisition and control system for the Diablo liquid bipropellant engine

Flying Robot Driver

PCB for driving inductive magnetic coils to control tiny flying robots for the Lin Lab at Berkeley

DAN-E Avionics

PCB to actuate pneumatic actuators using an IMU to detect rocket orientation, flying with the DAN-E payload

Motor Driver

PCB designed to control a wide range of motors up to 60V, including DC, BLDC, and steppers, used for controls testing

Mini Projects

DAQ Environmental Tracker

Simple PCB to telemeter temperature, humidity, and pressure in the Diablo DAQ and transmit over Ethernet

Stacklight Driver

Simple PCB to switch parts of an industrial stacklight on an off, with Ethernet connectivity

RS485 Transceiver

Simple PCB that can gather information over I2C / SPI and transmit it over RS485. Made for testing purposes.
